summary: Backend refactoring Phase 6 testing complete - All Mom routes migrated from server.py to routes/mom.py are working correctly. 32/32 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Modular mom router migration successful - routes/mom.py properly integrated via dependencies.py pattern
All mom routes correctly prefixed with /api/mom through APIRouter(prefix='/mom') and api_router inclusion
Role-based access control working - All mom endpoints correctly require MOM role (return 403 for DOULA/MIDWIFE)
Auth routes regression verified - /api/auth/login and /api/auth/me still work correctly
Provider routes regression verified - /api/provider/clients and /api/provider/dashboard still work correctly
MOCKED subscription endpoints still functional from Phase 5 migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring Phase 6 complete. Mom routes at /api/mom/* now served from modular router (routes/mom.py). All 9 mom endpoints verified: profile (GET/PUT), onboarding, midwife-visits, team, team-providers, invoices, invoices/{id}, appointments. Server.py reduced from 6,893 to 6,599 lines. Auth routes (Phase 4), Subscription routes (Phase 5), and Provider routes continue to work correctly.

mom_profile.note: Returns user_id and profile data; requires MOM role

mom_profile_update.note: Updates profile fields like location_city, location_state

mom_onboarding.note: Sets due_date, planned_birth_setting, location; initializes birth plan

mom_team.note: Returns connected providers with profiles and share requests

mom_team_providers.note: Returns providers for messaging (user_id, full_name, role)

mom_midwife_visits.note: Returns visits from linked clients; includes provider info

mom_invoices.note: Returns invoices where mom is linked client

mom_invoice_by_id.note: Returns specific invoice; 404 if not found or not authorized

mom_appointments.note: Creates appointment request; requires provider_id and active share connection

architecture_notes.modular_routes: Mom routes migrated to /app/backend/routes/mom.py with prefix='/mom'
architecture_notes.dependencies: Shared dependencies via /app/backend/routes/dependencies.py - uses get_current_user(), check_role(), db, get_now()
architecture_notes.role_based_access: All mom endpoints require MOM role via check_role(['MOM']) - returns 403 for DOULA/MIDWIFE
architecture_notes.server_reduction: Server.py reduced from 6,893 to 6,599 lines after mom routes migration

mocked_apis_list: Subscription endpoints remain MOCKED (start-trial, activate, validate-receipt)
mocked_apis.note: Mom routes use real database queries; subscription routes remain mocked
